title: Bulk Reclassification
subtitle: Move aggregated balances between GL accounts. Preview captures exact lines; Approve locks the proposal and queues the reclassification JE.
empty_description: Create a proposal to move aggregated balances from one account to another. The system captures matching JE lines on Preview and waits for OWNER approval before queueing the reclassification JE.

proposal_modal.label: NEW PROPOSAL
proposal_modal.title: New reclassification proposal
proposal_modal.lifecycle_hint: A proposal goes through DRAFT → PREVIEWED → APPROVED. The posting JE fires after approval once the backend splice ships.
proposal_modal.description_placeholder: e.g. Reclassify Q3 marketing to advertising expense
proposal_modal.description_contains_hint: Only JE lines whose original description contains this string are captured on preview.
proposal_modal.error_same_account: From and To cannot be the same account.
proposal_modal.error_date_order: Date to cannot be earlier than date from.
proposal_modal.error_generic: Failed to create proposal. Please try again.

drawer.label: RECLASSIFICATION
drawer.warning_title: High-stakes action: review the captured lines carefully
drawer.warning_body: Approving this proposal locks the captured line set and queues a reclassification JE that will move aggregated balances between accounts. This is an accounting adjustment — a supervisor should validate the From / To accounts and line list before approving.
drawer.no_captured_lines: Preview captured no matching JE lines. Adjust the filters on the proposal or cancel.
drawer.posting_deferred_note: Note: the actual JE posting fires after a follow-up backend dispatch ships. The shape above shows the legs the reclassification JE will include.
